listPage.title: Story Bank
listPage.description: STAR stories for interview preparation and cover letter generation. The AI picks the right story for each question.

emptyState.title: No stories yet
emptyState.description: Add your first STAR story. Think of a time you solved a hard problem, led a team, or learned something important.

newPage.title: Add story
newPage.description: Write a STAR story from your career. Be specific — the AI uses every word.

detailsSection.title: Story Details
detailsSection.description: Give this story a memorable title and pick the interview category where it fits best.

form.titlePlaceholder: Delivering 12 renders in 48h under last-minute design changes

starSection.title: STAR Story
starSection.description: Write each part separately. The AI uses this structure to generate interview answers and cover letter paragraphs.

form.situationPrompt: Set the scene. What was the context, the challenge, or the trigger? Don't solve anything yet.
form.situationPlaceholder: The client needed to present the university auditorium to investors in 48 hours. The design had just changed for the third time...
form.taskPrompt: What was specifically your responsibility in this situation?
form.taskPlaceholder: I was responsible for producing all 12 architectural renders from the updated CAD drawings...
form.actionPrompt: What did YOU do? Use 'I', not 'we'. Be specific about your decisions and process.
form.actionPlaceholder: I reorganized the render queue to prioritize hero angles, optimized material assets to reduce render time by 30%, and coordinated with the design team overnight to validate each iteration...
form.resultPrompt: What happened? What changed? Quantify if possible.
form.resultPlaceholder: Delivered all 12 renders 2 hours before the deadline. The client presented successfully and closed the deal the following week...

contextSection.title: Context
contextSection.description: Help the AI understand what skills this story demonstrates and which keywords to match against job descriptions.

form.impactDescription: A single sentence. Numbers are powerful: "Reduced render time 30%", "Closed €50K deal".
form.impactPlaceholder: Delivered 12 renders on time. Client closed the deal.
form.keywordsDescription: Terms from job descriptions this story addresses.
